results.title: Star Trek Beyond
results.overview: The USS Enterprise crew explores the furthest reaches of uncharted space, where they encounter a mysterious new enemy who puts them and everything the Federation stands for to the test.

results.title: Star Trek: 30 Years and Beyond
results.overview: A star-studded tribute to Star Trek on its 30th anniversary, hosted by many of the stars and guest stars from all of the Trek series and movies. Also features a huge number of clips from all of the series and movies. At the end, real-life astronauts Aldrin and Jemison present NASA award plaques to the cast members.

results.title: Star Trek: Beyond the Final Frontier
results.original_title: Star Trek: Beyond the Final Frontier
results.overview: This History Channel special examines Christie's 40th Anniversary auction of the franchise's most recognizable film and television memorabilia, and features interviews with cast, crew and fans.

results.title: Beyond the Five Year Mission - The Evolution of Star Trek: The Next Generation
results.original_title: Beyond the Five Year Mission - The Evolution of Star Trek: The Next Generation
results.overview: Newly-produced documentary offering a behind the scenes exploration of Star Trek: The Next Generation's sixth season. Featuring all-new interviews with the cast and crew of the iconic science fiction drama.

results.title: The Making of Star Trek: First Contact
results.original_title: The Making of Star Trek: First Contact
results.overview: The Making of Star Trek: First Contact was a 25-minute television documentary which aired on the HBO television channel in the US in 1996. This film was also broadcast in the UK as Star Trek Beyond First Contact and was given a new title card but still retained the original title on the program card that was used to frame the show's commercial breaks.  The film focused on behind-the-scenes footage and interviews with the cast and crew of Star Trek: First Contact and it discussed the Star Trek phenomenon and its popularity. It was first broadcast to commemorate Star Trek's 30th anniversary and to promote the feature film.
